kw.name: Create API Session
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=ue_api, url=http://127.0.0.1:8000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Create HTTP session for API calls

test.name: TC-028: Fail when UE ID is invalid

kw.name: Reset API State
POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/reset path_url=/reset headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Reset backend state before each test

kw.name: Adding bearer to UE ${INVALID_UE_ID} with ID ${VALID_BEARER_ID} should fail
kw.source_name: Adding bearer to UE ${ue_id} with ID ${bearer_id} should fail

kw.name: Prepare Json Headers
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Prepare Json request headers

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/ues/999/bearers path_url=/ues/999/bearers headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '18'} body=b'{"bearer_id": "2"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Attempts to add a bearer and expects the request to be rejected.

kw.name: User verifies that bearer ${VALID_BEARER_ID} is present for UE ${VALID_UE_ID}
kw.source_name: User verifies that bearer ${bearer_id} is present for UE ${ue_id}

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/ues/1 path_url=/ues/1 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.msg: ${bearers} = {'9': {'bearer_id': 9, 'protocol': None, 'target_bps': None, 'active': False}, '2': {'bearer_id': 2, 'protocol': None, 'target_bps': None, 'active': False}}
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.
Checks if the bearer exists in the UE's configuration.

kw.name: POST On Session

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.
Sends a request to add a bearer but omits the bearer_id from the request body.
